description_long: This is a rectangular, freestanding banner with a predominantly light gray surface and a printed design on one face. The front features red Cyrillic text, a stylized sun emblem, and an illustration of two people in front of a yellow sunburst, suggesting a cultural or promotional theme. The sides and back are plain, with a consistent light gray color and a subtle fabric-like texture. The banner appears to be made from a lightweight, rigid material, likely cardboard or foamboard, with a matte finish. Its clean, boxy shape and lack of visible mounting hardware indicate it is designed to stand alone on flat surfaces. The overall appearance is simple and functional, suitable for indoor or sheltered outdoor use in public or commercial spaces.
description: A freestanding, rectangular banner with a light gray body and a printed front featuring red Cyrillic text and a sun-themed illustration. The sides and back are plain and matte, giving it a clean, professional look.
description_view_0: A plain, light gray side of the banner with no visible markings or design elements.
description_view_1: The front face displays red Cyrillic text, a sun emblem, and an illustration of two people, making it the most visually detailed side.
description_view_2: Another plain, light gray side identical to view 0, with no visible graphics or text.
description_view_3: The back of the banner, also plain and light gray, with a slightly wider surface than the sides.
